name: io.github.billy12151/memory-arbiter-mcp
description: Shared memory store for AI coding tools with dual-timeline conflict arbitration.

environmentVariables.description: Optional alternate JSON config path. File values override other env fallbacks.
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_ARBITER_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Client identity (e.g. zcode, codex, cursor, claude-code)
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_ARBITER_CLIENT

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite database file
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_ARBITER_DB_PATH
